$description: Bounded Systems brand tokens. Source of truth. Three tiers: primitive (raw palette) → color (semantic roles, alias primitives) → text (component recipes). Edit here; regenerate tokens.css via build-tokens.mjs. Only the semantic/recipe layers are emitted as --bs-*; primitives are the source-of-truth palette the semantics point at (change a primitive → every role that aliases it updates).

primitive.$description: Raw palette. Not emitted directly — referenced by the semantic color tier. Theming = change a primitive once.

green-500.$description: Bright sage — hairline/border on forest (non-text AA, 3.19:1; CVD-safe)

green-600.$description: Deep sage — functional border/divider on LIGHT surfaces (non-text AA ≥3:1 on white/paper/tint; CVD-safe)

ink-600.$description: Muted ink (secondary + mono-label text — one canonical muted grey)

line.$description: Hairline / divider — warm grey, non-text AA ≥3:1 on white/paper (CVD-safe)

clay-600.$description: Clay — text AA + CVD-safe (≥4.5:1 under deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia on paper & clay wash)

clay-100.$description: Clay wash (lightened so clay-on-clay-tint text clears 4.5:1 on all CVD variants — deuteranopia was 4.22:1 at #F2DED8)

amber-600.$description: Amber — text AA + CVD-safe (≥4.5:1 under deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia on paper & amber wash)

card-alt.$description: Light avatar fill — alias of paper (collapsed from cream #F4F1EA; ΔE 1.78 was an imperceptible near-duplicate)

ink-mono.$description: Mono label / slug text — alias of ink-soft (collapsed from ink-500 #5E6B62; ΔE 0.92 was an imperceptible near-duplicate)

forest-soft.$description: Functional border/divider on light surfaces (non-text AA ≥3:1; was green-200 — split out so on-forest text can stay light while borders meet 1.4.11)

on-forest.$description: Primary text on the forest panel (AA, 6.0:1)

on-forest-line.$description: Hairline / border on forest — functional non-text contrast (AA ≥3:1, CVD-safe)

size.$typeComment: Type scale — SEMANTIC roles in REM (scales with the user's font-size / zoom — px would pin it), headings FLUID via clamp() (smooth across viewports, no breakpoint jumps; the clamp max preserves the prior desktop px so consumers don't shift). 1rem = 16px root.

text-body.$description: Body — 1rem (16px root) so primary body clears the APCA size-aware comfort tier (Lc ≥90), and scales with the user's font-size preference.

size-readable.$description: Narrow measure — a single column of dense text.

size-prose.$description: Comfortable reading measure (~65 characters) for body content.

size-card.$description: Min track width for an auto-fill card grid.

size-card-sm.$description: Min track width for a compact card grid (swatches, tiles).

space.$description: Spacing scale — margin / padding / gap. A coherent 4px-based ramp so composition is predictable (no uncoordinated raw values). 0 / hairline / 4 / 8 / 12 / 16 / 20 / 24 / 28 / 32 / 40 / 48 / 64 / 80 / 96 px.

control.$description: Interactive-target / control sizing. The accessible-pointer-target tokens a surface uses for buttons, icon hit-areas, inputs, and list rows. min-tap-target is the WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 (AA) floor (24px); control-md+ also meet SC 2.5.5 (AAA, 44px). Use a control-* token (or min-tap-target as a min-block/inline-size) so every interactive target ships an accessible bounding box — verified by the target-size member of the Token Accessibility suite.

min-tap-target.$description: WCAG 2.2 SC 2.5.8 (AA) minimum pointer-target side — the floor. Apply as min-width/min-height on any interactive control.

sm.$description: Compact control (chips, dense toolbars) — clears 2.5.8 AA (24px) with margin.

md.$description: Default control — meets 2.5.5 (AAA, 44px) and Apple HIG / Material touch-target guidance.

grade.$description: Graded-claim status colours. Base only — build-tokens.mjs derives -bg (light surface) and -fg (readable text) tints deterministically.

label.$description: Slug / eyebrow: mono uppercase tracked label.
